title: Severance
creator: Ben Stiller
note: The most accurate depiction of corporate tech culture ever made. Every platform team has a Lumon somewhere in the org chart.

title: The Bear
creator: Christopher Storer
note: About what it costs to build something great. The kitchen scenes feel like a war room the day before a release — chaotic, high-stakes, deeply human.

title: Dune: Part Two
creator: Denis Villeneuve
note: Villeneuve understands that scale only matters if you care about the people inside it. A rare blockbuster that trusts its audience.

title: Blue Eye Samurai
creator: Michael Green
note: A meditation on mastery and the price of obsession. The animation is jaw-dropping, but the writing is what keeps you up past midnight.
